summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: Euler nine-point circle. ValueTracker s_tr morphs BLUE triangle through 4 configs. always_redraw rebuilds: 3 midpoints of sides, 3 feet of altitudes (via DashedLine perpendicular drops from vertices), 3 midpoints between vertices and orthocenter H — all 9 RED dots on YELLOW circle of center (O+H)/2 and radius R/2. Legend for O, H, np-center.
